I have looked into the failure purely from the test-case point of view. The existing test_75 IMO, have a false positive and a sementic error which needs to be addressed regardless of LU-15129. 

Thanks

commit.subject: LU-15129 tests: sanity-quota/test_75 Improvements
commit.message:
LU-15129 tests: sanity-quota/test_75 Improvements

This patch improves sanity-quota/test_75 to
check for grace expiry before reporting error
for write. If grace has expired before issuing
write it ignores the error as that is expected.

This patch also does other miscellaneous cleanups.

Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=sanity-quota env=ONLY=75,ONLY_REPEAT=200
Signed-off-by: Arshad Hussain <arshad.hussain@aeoncomputing.com>
Change-Id: I798af61445be419b1a6f4cb2f5f4cfba80ca553e
